offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease payments/month, inconsistent tracking causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated formatting instead of manual spreadsheets and email reminders.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of lease payment statuses
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows

Join community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for payment statuses
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
